Home.heroTagline: Two unique houses in Montalegre — historic charm by the castle, quiet nature by the river.
Home.regionBody: Between granite mountains and green valleys, Montalegre preserves a pace of life the modern world has forgotten. River, castle, forest and silence — just outside your door.
Home.whatsappBody: We respond within 24 hours. Book without intermediaries, with flexibility and confidence.
Home.sisterBody: Looking for tours and experiences in the region? Natur Barroso organises walks, gastronomy and nature adventures.

Footer.cookieNotice: This site uses essential cookies. By continuing, you accept their use.

Regiao.heroTagline: From the mountains to the river — the north you haven't discovered yet.
Regiao.introBody: Montalegre lies in the far north interior of Portugal, among granite mountains, deep valleys, and cold rivers — at the heart of Trás-os-Montes, just a short drive from Peneda-Gerês National Park and Serra do Larouco. It is a landscape of contrasts: absolute silence and unique festivals like the Festival of the Witches, harsh winters and perfect summers for hiking. Montalegre is a medieval town with a castle, smoked meats, and a hospitality that isn't learned, it's born.
Regiao.springNote: Lush green landscape, wildflowers — the best season for walking trails.
Regiao.summerNote: Mild temperatures, long days — peak season, book early.
Regiao.autumnNote: Autumn colours, smoked meats season, harvest. Best for gastronomy.
Regiao.winterNote: Possible snow at altitude, Fumeiro Fair in January, fireplace essential.
Regiao.gettingHereNote: A car is the best option — the scenery along the way is worth the journey.
Regiao.practicalCar: A car is essential — public transport does not reach this area
Regiao.practicalSignal: Mobile signal is limited outside villages — download offline maps before you leave
Regiao.practicalWater: Rivers and streams run cold even in summer — ideal for swimming and fishing
Regiao.practicalWeather: Harsh winters with occasional snow at altitude; mild summers with cool nights
Regiao.practicalLanguage: English is rarely spoken outside main attractions — a few words of Portuguese go a long way

PropertyDetail.bookingDirectNote: Contact us via WhatsApp or phone.
